Justification.Explanation: HL-MAP-2.2 currently uses the misspelled name "Cell Clasification" in the High-Level Requirements. The Low-Level Requirements have been updated to reflect the corrected name "Cell Classification" to restore traceability consistency across HL and LL documents. This change aligns both levels and supports accurate cross-referencing in architecture reviews and test cases.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="HL-MAP-2.2"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Cell Classification</Name> <Content>Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas</Content> <Relationships/> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: LL-LOC-7.1 previously exhibited a potential redundancy by combining a DependsOn to LL-EXPL-1.1 with a Refines to HL-EXPL-1.1. The updated state removes the redundant dependency and keeps a single, clean trace from LL-LOC-7.1 to its prerequisites, ensuring an acyclic refinement graph.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-LOC-7.1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Localization and Pose Estimation</Name> <Relationships> <Refines>HL-EXPL-1.1</Refines> <DependsOn>LL-EXPL-1.2</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-INTERF-6.1</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-MAP-2.1</DependsOn> </Relationships> <Content>Robot shall estimate its pose in the environment using sensor fusion and provide pose with uncertainty; Pose updates shall be integrated into the map and planning modules.</Content> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: Note: The LL-LOC-7.1 update above resolves the prior redundancy issues. This finding confirms that no additional separate LL changes are required in this iteration beyond the LL-LOC-7.1 modification.

Implementation.Solution: Note: The redundancy issue was resolved by updating LL-LOC-7.1 as shown above. No further changes are required beyond LL-LOC-7.1 in this iteration.
